customer_messages.body: Dear Northwind Strategic team, we have identified critical issues requiring immediate attention across your account. Our dedicated recovery team has been engaged and specialists from Legal, Finance, Customer Success, and Support have been assigned to work with you. We are prioritizing resolution and will contact you shortly to schedule a recovery review. Your account health and partnership are of paramount importance to us.
